tables.description: This sample attributes table includes body site where sample was collected, analyte type, histological type, tumor status, tumor stage of sample, and age of individual when sample was taken.

variables.name: AGE
variables.description: Age of individual when sample was taken

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: The analyte type of the sample

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: The collection site of the sample

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: The tissue type of the sample

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: The tumor status of the sample

tables.description: This subject phenotypes data table includes subject's sex, race, and affection status for any stage of multiple myeloma (MM) progression.

variables.name: AFFECTION_STATUS
variables.description: Case control status of the subject for any stage of MM progression

tables.description: The subject consent data table includes subject IDs and consent group information.

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

tables.description: This subject sample mapping data table includes a mapping of study subject IDs to sample IDs. Samples are the final preps submitted for genotyping, sequencing, and/or expression data. For example, if one patient (subject ID) gave one sample, and that sample was processed differently to generate 2 sequencing runs, there would be two rows, both using the same subject ID, but having 2 unique sample IDs.
